# two-judge-quorum manifest
# Covers: Parser tolerance (STATUS=ERROR whole-output ineligibility);
#         Threshold Rules (2 voters unanimous → voted; 2 voters 1-1 tie → fallback)

DECISION_1 expected_disposition=voted expected_tally=THESIS=2,ANTI_THESIS=0
DECISION_2 expected_disposition=fallback-to-synthesis expected_tally=THESIS=1,ANTI_THESIS=1
